additionalParameters.ui:description: Additional command line parameters to pass to kubectl or helm commands.

helmSet.ui:description: Override Helm chart values using key-value pairs. Supports multiline YAML values for complex configurations. Values longer than 3 characters will be **concealed in logs** for security.

dryRun.ui:description: Simulate the operation without making actual changes.

dryRunOption.ui:description: **server**: server-side validation with API calls | **client**: client-side validation without API calls

deleteNamespace.ui:description: ⚠️ **Warning:** Delete the namespace along with all resources.

useKustomize.ui:description: Use Kustomize to build and apply manifests. When enabled, specify the kustomization directory path in the field below.

kubeymlfile.ui:description: Path relative to repository root. **Regular manifests:** directory containing YAML files (e.g., `deployments/`). **Kustomize:** directory containing kustomization.yaml (e.g., `overlay/prod`). Leave empty to use repository root.
